title: Iterative cycles 1-4: walk-forward, multi-asset, model comparison, GARCH adversarial
interpretation: FNO_small beats cascade on 6/8 assets in 2025+ OOS test. XLF (0.142 vs -0.071) and XLV (0.058 vs -0.062) are now positive (fixed from previous -0.195). FNO fails on EFA (-0.153) where cascade is near-zero. International generalization works for GLD (0.063) and EWJ (0.032) but not EFA (-0.153).
